lines: @@ -118,7 +118,7 @@ Questi file restano visibili in Notes, PR Report e Dashboard. Vengono rimossi so

| Gemini CLI | Preview | Sì | Sì | Sì | Sì | Non ancora |

`Files` significa che Agent Note può mostrare quali file committati sono stati toccati dall'Agent. `Line Estimate` significa che può anche stimare le linee scritte dall'AI invece di contare solo i file.
@@ -118,7 +118,7 @@ Esses arquivos continuam aparecendo em Notes, PR Report e Dashboard. Eles são r
| Claude Code | Full support | Sim | Sim | Sim | Sim | Por padrão |
| Codex CLI | Supported | Sim | Sim | Sim | Sim | Quando o histórico de patches do Codex bate com o Commit final |
-| Cursor | Supported | Sim | Sim | Sim | Sim | Quando as contagens de edit e o file final batem |
+| Cursor | Supported | Sim | Sim | Sim | Sim | Quando a contagem de edições e o arquivo final coincidem |
| Gemini CLI | Preview | Sim | Sim | Sim | Sim | Ainda não |

`Files` significa que Agent Note pode mostrar quais arquivos commitados foram tocados pelo Agent. `Line Estimate` significa que ele também pode estimar linhas escritas pela IA, em vez de apenas contar arquivos.
@@ -70,7 +70,7 @@ Shell-only edits are not guessed from command text. If no reliable transcript is

-Cursor support uses `afterFileEdit` / `afterTabFileEdit` hooks plus response hooks or local transcripts. Line-level attribution is possible only when the committed blob still matches the latest AI edit.

+Cursor support uses `afterFileEdit` / `afterTabFileEdit` hooks plus response hooks or local transcripts. Line-level attribution is possible only when the committed file still matches the latest AI edit.
Cursor preview tracks plain `git commit` normally when the generated git hooks are installed.

-  Its hooks also capture prompts, response metadata, and `afterFileEdit` / `afterTabFileEdit` attribution data, with a safe line-level upgrade when the committed blob still matches the last AI edit. `agent-note commit` remains a useful fallback wrapper when git hooks are unavailable.

+  Its hooks also capture prompts, response metadata, and `afterFileEdit` / `afterTabFileEdit` attribution data, with a safe line-level upgrade when the committed file still matches the last AI edit. `agent-note commit` remains a useful fallback wrapper when git hooks are unavailable.

+Cursor nutzt `afterFileEdit` / `afterTabFileEdit` plus Response Hooks oder lokale Transcripts. Line-level ist nur möglich, wenn die finale Datei noch zum letzten AI edit passt.

-  Files berarti Agent Note dapat menunjukkan file yang di-commit dan disentuh oleh Agent. Line Estimate berarti Agent Note juga dapat memperkirakan baris yang ditulis AI, bukan hanya menghitung file. Preview berarti Agent Note mendukung perilaku publik saat ini, tetapi format local hook atau transcript agent masih dapat berubah.

@@ -70,7 +70,7 @@ shell-only edit は command 文字列だけから推測しません。信頼で
-Cursor は `afterFileEdit` / `afterTabFileEdit` hook と response hook または local transcript を使います。line-level は、committed blob が最後の AI edit とまだ一致しているときだけ可能です。
+Cursor は `afterFileEdit` / `afterTabFileEdit` hook と response hook または local transcript を使います。line-level は、committed file が最後の AI edit とまだ一致しているときだけ可能です。
Cursor でも、生成された git hook が入っていれば通常の `git commit` をそのまま記録できます。
-  prompt、response metadata、`afterFileEdit` / `afterTabFileEdit` による attribution を記録し、最後の AI edit 後の blob がそのまま commit に残っている場合だけ安全に line-level へ昇格します。git hook が使えない環境では `agent-note commit` が代替手段です。
